comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Iteration 6 progress: landed another Ralph cleanup slice and reran `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate` successfully. This pass tightened `ralph_done` ownership to the iteration session, scoped pending `agent_end` waits to the expected session, removed the adapter `__testing` shim surface, and hardened archive path checks in the repo. Current blocker from spec review: `src/ralph/index.ts` still owns a broad command-side state/persistence surface (current-loop/state/archive flows) that should move behind domain-level Ralph service methods before tau-8yog can close. Continuing with adapter-surface narrowing next.
